project.title: Signal Observatory
project.intent: Create a fictional monitoring interface that combines a legible identity, keyboard-first control, and a responsive card composition.

evidence.observation: Two short statements distinguish the formal system name from its familiar call sign.
A persistent prompt accepts terse commands and prints explicit success or error feedback.
Named grid areas change across breakpoints while semantic card order remains stable.

selection.summary: Formal name followed by a familiar call sign

adaptation.intent: Give the fictional tool a technical name and a human shorthand without ambiguity.
directives: Keep both names visible in the first viewport.

include: A clear relationship between formal and familiar names.
exclude: Reference names, wording, typography, and 3D assets.

hints: Use two related heading lines and a concise role statement.

verification.subject: hero.identity
verification.expectation: Formal name, call sign, and role appear in that DOM order.

selection.summary: Keyboard-first command prompt with visible feedback

adaptation.intent: Let visitors jump between observatory panels without hiding ordinary links.
directives: Keep semantic links as the non-script fallback.

exclude: Decorative terminal text that implies commands work when they do not.

hints: Use a form, input label, output live region, and bounded history.

verification.subject: navigation.prompt
verification.expectation: Entering help lists the supported commands in a live region.

selection.summary: Named responsive grid areas with varied card spans

properties.name: desktop-grid
properties.value: four columns with wide, tall, and square regions

adaptation.intent: Make monitoring panels scannable while keeping the primary signal dominant.
directives: Assign semantic names to grid areas.

include: At least three distinct card proportions.
exclude: The reference's exact grid map, content, and illustrations.

hints: Use CSS grid-template-areas at explicit breakpoints.

verification.subject: home.bento
verification.expectation: The grid has four columns at 1280px and one column at 390px.

composition.purpose: Introduce and control the fictional observatory from one responsive surface.

decisions.resolution: Keep the hero spacious; confine dense command output to one bento card.

guardrails: Do not copy source prose, brands, code, or assets.
